# Transcrição: 13-Breakpoints and Inflection Points

- **Fonte:** 13-Breakpoints and Inflection Points
- **Duração:** 02:59
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:59]

Breakpoints are those periods where growth is interrupted in the business. These interruptions could happen for any number of reasons. Process, people, fear, bad decision making, market disruptions, anything can cause a breakpoint. But what's most important is how you respond when you're in a breakpoint in your business. When you fall backwards, when your business goes through a decline that's called a slipback, a breakpoint is a moment in time when your business technically breaks. These disruptions, where you slip back, is what I call an inflection point. Depending on how you manage the situation, you will either be making your way through the cycle of growth or a cycle of decline, a slipback. You will have a tendency to be reactive in life. And that reactive nature doesn't usually involve a whole lot of listening, reflection, or positivity. A reactive nature is mostly just resistance, which in turn creates friction. The same is true in business. I would urge you to embrace your breakpoints. They're going to happen. Now you can predict them, you can be educated on what they're going to be and when they're coming if you work with us. But nonetheless, embrace breakpoints. These are inflection points where you're going to bust through to another level of success. So of course it's hard. You're doing something you haven't done before. Of course it's scary. Of course failure can happen. Embrace that now or you're never going to grow your business. There's a reason they're happening, by the way. They're happening because your business is telling you something. But are you listening? It's through your struggles and by paying closer attention to why they're happening, that you'll earn a more granular understanding of your business. Honoring these moments will help you honor your business and will create a level of growth you might have never thought possible. Let's face it, unless you've been through the process as a business owner, as many times as I have, the weight of growth can kill you. It can just demolish your business. You'll buckle under the pressure. Most people just don't know what to expect from the different stages of a business growth cycle. All businesses have breakpoints. Knowing where you're at in the cycle of growth and knowing what's coming next that you'll need to have in place in order to break through versus break down is critically important. As part of this program, we're going to include my breakpoint presentation so that you can see exactly how to think about growing and scaling your business and making it through the breakpoints to maximize your value and build an unbelievably rewarding business.
